message:
feat(ingest): add string column support to Arrow IPC ingest

Arrow ingest now properly handles string/utf8 columns instead of
skipping them. The implementation:
- Adds string to supported column types in the filter loop
- Reads strings via ArrowIpcReader.readStringColumn()
- Encodes with PlainEncoder.writeStrings() including offsets buffer

CSV string ingest was already working (verified still functional).
